title: Migrating a production AI agent to GPT-5.6: 2.2x faster, 27% cheaper
summary: This article details the migration of a production AI agent from an older GPT model to GPT-5.6, reporting a 2.2x speed increase and 27% cost reduction. It covers the technical process, performance benchmarks, and practical trade-offs involved in upgrading a deployed agent, offering insights for teams considering similar migrations.
